query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND (TABLE_NAME LIKE '%game%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%player%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%progress%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%combat%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%quest%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%achieve%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%transaction%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3C9YCXxCojabUDk.eefe8f8e8b67 --database FUZ2ecmXaKXVi9q85vHrsr --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND (TABLE_NAME LIKE '%game%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%player%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%progress%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%combat%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%quest%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%achieve%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%transaction%');
